units.translation_target_text: 3 The table for the fourth quarter of 2025 shows the highest annual percentage changes in inflation and forecast policy rates in the United States and Mexico, and the lowest annual percentage changes in other countries and regions. In the case of the United Arab Emirates and Hong Kong, policies are favorable

units.source_text: 商品價格⼤幅下挫，失業率迅速上升。
units.translation_target_text: Commodity prices fell sharply and unemployment rose rapidly.
units.translation_en: Commodity prices fell sharply and unemployment rose rapidly.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Commodity prices fell sharply and unemployment rose rapidly.

units.source_text: 此境況下的關稅⾏動升級，引發環球貿易戰，並進⼀步加劇地緣政治危
units.translation_target_text: The escalation of tariff actions under this situation has triggered a global trade war and further aggravated geopolitical risks.
units.translation_en: The escalation of tariff actions under this situation has triggered a global trade war and further aggravated geopolitical risks.
